title: eleocharis papillosa
intro: Eleocharis papillosa, also known as hairy spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis papillosa include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
